mapper.select: SELECT a.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_sat.code_label AS adj_type_cd_nm FROM st_settle_adj a LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sat ON cd_sat.code_grp = 'SETTLE_ADJ_TYPE' AND cd_sat.code_value = a.adj_type_cd WHERE a.settle_adj_id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_sat.code_label AS adj_type_cd_nm FROM st_settle_adj a LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sat ON cd_sat.code_grp = 'SETTLE_ADJ_TYPE' AND cd_sat.code_value = a.adj_type_cd
ORDER BY a.settle_adj_id ASC ORDER BY a.settle_adj_id DESC ORDER BY a.reg_date ASC ORDER BY a.reg_date DESC ORDER BY a.reg_date DESC
